name: Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces firm tofu, drained and chunked
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together broth, vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, cornstarch, and sesame oil in a bowl.
2. Stir-fry garlic and ginger in 1 tablespoon oil in a nonstick skillet until softened and lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
3. Transfer the garlic mixture to the broth mixture.
4. Heat remaining oil in the skillet.
5. Add eggplant and green onion; stir-fry until eggplant and onions are just tender, about 8 minutes.
6. Add tofu and radishes to the skillet.
7. Stir gently over high heat until the sauce boils and thickens.
8. Serve immediately.
